name: app-store-connect-api
description: Guide for implementing Apple App Store Connect API integrations. Use when: (1) Building API clients to manage certificates, provisioning profiles, bundle IDs, or devices, (2) Implementing JWT authentication for App Store Connect, (3) Understanding API request/response patterns and error handling, (4) Working with TestFlight builds, beta groups, or app submissions, (5) Discovering available endpoints, schemas, or capabilities via the OpenAPI spec.
